Pet, For Determination Of Intentional Interference With Right To Inherit; Negligent Interference Wit
Off Calendar Jun-27-2011 Continued To Aug-29-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Peter Dmytyk for John McCann and Colleen Dempsey (Trustees). Darren Judd for Daniel McCann (Petitioner).

Discussions were held with regard to venue, service of the summons, the Clerk not issuing the summons and how to proceed with the matter. The Court stated that the matter proceed in San Francisco, that the Clerk issue a summons (Court will sign an order), that it anticipates an attack on the first two causes of actions and then based on that, if those first two causes of actions survive what's tried is the entire three causes of action or if those two causes of action don't survive, what's tried is the declaratory relief. The matter was continued to August 29, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of the motion or stipulation on how to proceed.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
